gamma/ai-agent.description: Primary AI assistant for creating presentations, documents, websites, and social content. Capable of generating text, images, and full layouts from natural language prompts.
gamma/ai-agent.notes: Available across Gamma plans with varying capabilities and credit usage.

gamma/basic-image-models.description: Standard image generation tier. Cost: 2-15 credits per image.
gamma/basic-image-models.notes: Available on Free and Plus plans. Represents Gamma's standard image capability tier.

gamma/advanced-image-models.description: Enhanced image generation tier with higher quality output. Cost: 20-33 credits per image.
gamma/advanced-image-models.notes: Available on Plus and above. Represents Gamma's advanced image capability tier.

gamma/premium-image-models.description: Premium image generation tier with advanced capabilities. Cost: 34-75 credits per image.
gamma/premium-image-models.notes: Available on Pro and above. Represents Gamma's premium image capability tier.

gamma/ultra-image-models.description: Most advanced image generation tier, offering cinematic quality and full-image slides. Cost: 30-125 credits per image.
gamma/ultra-image-models.notes: Available exclusively on the Ultra and Business plans. Represents Gamma's highest image capability tier.

presentations.description: Create AI-generated presentations from text prompts.

documents.description: Generate documents, reports, and articles using AI.

websites.description: Build AI-generated websites and landing pages.

socials.description: Create social media posts and carousels.

ai-agent.description: AI assistant for editing, rewriting, and content refinement.

api.description: Programmatic access to Gamma generation capabilities (Pro, Ultra, Teams, Business).

analytics.description: Detailed per-viewer analytics and engagement insights.

password-protection.description: Protect content with password-based access control.

custom-fonts.description: Upload and apply custom fonts to content.

branding-removal.description: Remove 'Made with Gamma' branding from shared content.

templates.description: Access to workspace templates and pre-built themes.

workspaces.description: Shared team workspaces with centralized management.

teams.description: Team collaboration features and admin controls.

connectors.description: Integrations with ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, Make, and n8n.
connectors.notes: Available on all plans, including Free and Plus.

plans.notes: 400 one-time AI credits (no monthly refresh). Up to 10 cards per prompt. Gamma branding included. Import from PDF and PPTX. Export to PDF, PPTX, PNG, and Google Slides.
1,000 monthly AI credits. Up to 20 cards per prompt. Gamma branding removed. Advanced image models. Annual pricing: $9/month.
4,000 monthly AI credits. Up to 60 cards per prompt. Premium image models. API access. Custom fonts, password protection. Up to 10 custom domains. Annual pricing: $18/month.

20,000 monthly AI credits. Up to 75 cards per prompt. Ultra image models. Studio Mode for cinematic full-image slides. Up to 100 custom domains. Early access to new features. Monthly-only (annual pricing forthcoming).

Per-seat pricing (minimum 2 seats). 6,000 monthly credits per seat. Up to 60 cards per prompt. Everything in Pro. Centralized billing. Custom company theme. Shared folders & admin controls. Annual pricing: $240 per seat.

Per-seat pricing (minimum 10 seats). 10,000 monthly credits per seat. Up to 75 cards per prompt. Everything in Team. SSO authentication. Advanced data controls. Access to the most advanced image generation tiers. Annual pricing: $480 per seat.

models.notes: Standard image tier: credit consumption varies by generation complexity.
Advanced image tier: credit consumption varies by generation complexity.
Premium image tier: credit consumption varies by generation complexity.
Ultra image tier: credit consumption varies by generation complexity.

creditSystem.description: Gamma uses a credit-based billing system. Credit consumption varies by generation type, model tier, and content complexity.

apiAccess.description: API key access available on Pro, Ultra, Teams, and Business plans. Generations via API consume credits similarly to web/app usage.

autoRecharge.description: Recommended way to prevent failed generations due to exhausted credits. Can be enabled at Settings > Billing.

creditRollover.description: Unused monthly credits roll over up to 2× the plan's monthly allowance.

apiPricing.notes: API billing uses a credit-based system. Higher-tier subscribers receive more monthly credits. If you run out of credits, you can upgrade, purchase ad hoc credits, or enable auto-recharge. Credit consumption rates are determined by the selected image model tier and generation complexity.

notes: Gamma uses a card-based format where one card equals one slide or section. Free plan includes 400 one-time credits (no monthly refresh). Credit consumption depends on the selected generation features and model tier. Annual billing provides approximately two months free compared to monthly billing.
